label: Ingredient properties
description: Properties for things used as recipe inputs, controlling stack-merge behavior.

mergeCountOrDefault.label: Merge count or default
mergeCountOrDefault.description: Number of items merged into a single recipe ingredient slot. -1 uses the recipe default.

canMergeDifferentStuff.label: Can merge different stuff
canMergeDifferentStuff.description: Whether ingredients made from different stuff types can be mixed in the same bill.
